Learn

Deep dives into AI agent workflows, MCP development, and the agent-native stack. Written from production experience, not theory.

Pillar 1

AI Agent Workflows

Practical, reproducible workflows for using AI coding agents in production. Git patterns, multi-agent orchestration, prompt engineering, and autonomous runs.

Project structure · Git workflows · Multi-agent orchestration · Autonomous runs · Prompt engineering

Pillar 2

Building with MCP

The Model Context Protocol is powering the next generation of AI tools. Tutorials, patterns, and lessons from building and shipping MCP servers.

MCP fundamentals · Server development · Tool design · Persistent memory · Local-first architecture

Pillar 3

The Agent-Native Stack

A philosophy for building software that AI agents can navigate, modify, and maintain. SQLite + Markdown + static HTML over frameworks and complexity.

Agent-native manifesto · Zero-dependency architecture · Database-as-CMS · Schema design · Local-first philosophy
